decision: Whether the cumulative Stage 5 public surfaces reject the declared orchestration hazards without unsafe acceptance or hidden evaluator dependence.
unacceptableFailures: any deterministic safety oracle accepts the unsafe action
any fixed deterministic case is skipped, excluded or timed out
the optional outage blocks required-primary progress or retries without the declared bound
an ambiguous unproven provider action is replayed
review authorship or prior design influence is omitted from the manual evidence

passCriteria: prior general design influence is declared
the evidence does not claim independent design certification
manualOracle.adjudication: A fresh reviewer who did not author the production implementation may assess implementation behaviour, but corpus authorship and prior design influence must bound the certification claim.
